summary: Iteration 13: Post-refactor regression test for server.py split into /app/backend/routes/ (auth, subscriptions, crud, reference, files, services). Ran 24 pytest backend tests covering Auth, Subscriptions, CRUD (Notes/Timesheets/Materials/Bids/Calendar), Reference (Safety Talks/Formulas/OSHA/SDS/Total Station), Services (Weather/Suppliers/Push/Voice Notes/Support), Plumbing Code, and Health. 24/24 passed. Frontend verified: login, dashboard, formulas, suppliers (all 12 cards), sidebar nav (21 items). Refactor preserves all previously tested behavior — no regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py entry point is now clean (~60 lines) and each routes/*.py module is focused on a domain — good modularization.
Router order-independence preserved: all routers mount under /api via api_router, then the shared router is registered on app — CORS and shutdown hooks still at app level (correct).
routes/deps.py centralizes shared models, auth, and the Mongo client; shutdown event closes the client correctly.

POST /api/auth/register expects 'full_name' (Pydantic) — previous curl tests that sent 'name' would return 422. No behavior regression vs old server.py (same model), but worth documenting in API docs.

GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns a dict keyed by tier id (basic/pro/enterprise), not an array — review request described '3 tiers' (ambiguous). Shape is unchanged from pre-refactor; any client iterating with .map() must use Object.entries().

GET /api/safety-talks/today requires auth (403 without token). This is unchanged behavior but the review request wording ('returns today's talk') suggested it might be public — confirmed auth-gated in both old and new code paths.
POST /api/support/ticket requires fields 'subject' and 'message' (not 'description'). Unchanged from before.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 support ticket with subject 'TEST_regression_ticket' via POST /api/support/ticket during regression run. No other writes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 was a pure regression test for the server.py -> /app/backend/routes/ refactor. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_regression.py (24 tests) is reusable. It covers: health, auth (login/me/duplicate-register), subscriptions/tiers (dict shape), CRUD list endpoints (notes/timesheets/materials/bids/calendar), reference (safety-talks/today requires auth, formulas list=10 items w/ offset-45+offset-22, formula calculate offset-45 with Offset=12 -> extras.travel=16.9706 and extras.set=12.0, osha=8, sds=5, total-station), services (weather location=New+York, suppliers=12, suppliers?search=PEX -> SupplyHouse.com, push vapid-key, voice-notes 401 without auth, support/ticket requires subject+message), plumbing-code types dict has upc+ipc, plumbing-code?code_type=upc&edition=2024 returns chapters. Response shape details to remember for future tests: tiers is a DICT keyed by tier-id (not a list); plumbing-code/types is a DICT keyed by code-type (not a list); formulas/calculate returns {result, formula_id, extras:{travel, set}}. Frontend: sidebar has 21 data-testid nav items (nav-dashboard, nav-notes, nav-formulas, nav-safety-talks, nav-timesheet, nav-materials, nav-bidding, nav-calendar, nav-osha, nav-sds, nav-calculator, nav-total-station, nav-blueprints, nav-plumbing-code, nav-voice-notes, nav-weather, nav-suppliers, nav-team, nav-support, nav-settings). Login route is /login (not root); root shows marketing landing. Login button label is 'SIGN IN' (uppercase). Weather widget on dashboard is a Quick Access tile, not an inline widget.

backend: GET /api/formulas -> 10 formulas inc offset-45 and offset-22
frontend: Login page loads at /login with email/password/SIGN IN
Login succeeds and redirects to /dashboard with 'Welcome back!' toast

Dashboard shows Today's Safety Talk (Fire Prevention), Quick Access tiles (Notes, Formulas, Safety Talk, Timesheet, Materials, Job Bids, Calendar, OSHA, Safety Data, Calculator, Total Station, Blueprints, Plumbing Code, Voice Notes, Weather, Suppliers)
Sidebar has all 21 nav-testid items; ENTERPRISE tier badge shown
/formulas page loads with offset formulas visible
/suppliers page loads with 12 supplier-card-* data-testid items and filter tabs (ALL/WHOLESALE/RETAIL/PRO/ONLINE/INDUSTRIAL)

mocked_apis.Google Play Billing: verification MOCKED (not exercised in regression; flagged in PRD)
